description_for_human: Search and browse Automoto publications, people, projects, and focus areas.
description_for_model: Plugin for querying the Automoto data API. Use this to search across platform content, look up people, browse publications, and list focus areas.

functions.name: searchContent
functions.description: Search across all Automoto content including publications, people, and projects. Returns ranked results with titles, descriptions, and links.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

functions.name: getResearcher
functions.description: Get detailed information about a specific person including their bio, lab, focus areas, and publication count.

name.description: Name of the researcher to look up

functions.name: getPublications
functions.description: Browse and search academic publications from Automoto. Filter by topic, author, or year.

limit.description: Maximum number of publications to return

functions.name: getResearchAreas
functions.description: List all focus areas and labs at Automoto with descriptions and counts.
